Left side clutter unte, stress perugutundi.", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 3000, "diagram_data": {"svg": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100'><rect x='10' y='10' width='40' height='40' fill='yellow'/><rect x='50' y='10' width='40' height='40' fill='gray'/><text x='15' y='60'>Clear</text><text x='55' y='60'>Cluttered</text></svg>"}, "highlight": [], "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_html": "<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,user-scalable=no"><style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1A2B1A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100vh}svg{max-width:100%}</style></head><body><svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect width="400" height="300" fill="#1A2B1A"/>

<text x="200" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="serif" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#F0EDD0" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="0s"/>Lightness and Open Space</text>

<!-- Left Side: Clutter/Stress -->
<g stroke="#FF6B6B" stroke-width="2" fill="#FF6B6B" fill-opacity="0.25">
  <path d="M40 100 L60 100 L60 120 L40 120 Z" stroke-dasharray="80" stroke-dashoffset="80"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="80;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.3s"/></path>
  <path d="M70 90 L90 90 L90 110 L70 110 Z" stroke-dasharray="80" stroke-dashoffset="80"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="80;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.6s"/></path>
  <path d="M50 130 L70 130 L70 150 L50 150 Z" stroke-dasharray="80" stroke-dashoffset="80"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="80;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.9s"/></path>
  <path d="M80 120 L100 120 L100 140 L80 140 Z" stroke-dasharray="80" stroke-dashoffset="80"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="80;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="1.2s"/></path>
</g>
<text x="70" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="serif" font-size="11" fill="#FF6B6B" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="1.5s"/>Clutter = Stress</text>

<!-- Right Side: Open Space/Happiness -->
<g stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="2" fill="#81C784" fill-opacity="0.25">
  <ellipse cx="300" cy="120" rx="40" ry="40" stroke-dasharray="251" stroke-dashoffset="251"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="251;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="1.8s"/></ellipse>
</g>
<text x="300" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="serif" font-size="11" fill="#81C784" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="2.1s"/>Open = Happiness</text>

<!-- Divider -->
<line x1="200" y1="60" x2="200" y2="240" stroke="#8BAB8B" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 4"/>

<!-- Arrows -->
<path d="M120 120 L160 120 M150 110 L160 120 L150 130" stroke="#F0EDD0" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="50" stroke-dashoffset="50"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="50;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="2.4s"/></path>
<path d="M240 120 L280 120 M270 110 L280 120 L270 130" stroke="#F0EDD0" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="50" stroke-dashoffset="50"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="50;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="2.7s"/></path>
